attributes.additional_details:
The current PM, Cabinet and Labour Party have clearly lost the support of the nation following the local election results. 
The current government is not acting in the interests or in the will of the people of this nation.
attributes.background: A formal request to dissolve the current government that is failing to act in the best interest of the nation. Followed by an immediate general election.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
